characteristics.$text: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll, and, if that enemy unit is Below Half-strength, subtract 1 from the Wound roll as well.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly WRAITH CONSTRUCT units, this model has the [Lone Operative] ability.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Each time an enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) within Engagement Range of one or more units from your army with this ability is selected to Fall Back, models in that enemy unit must take Desperate Escape tests as if their unit was Battle-shocked. When doing so, if that enemy unit is also Battle-shocked by other means, subtract 1 from each of those Desperate Escape tests.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Once per battle round, one model from your army with this ability can use it when a friendly EXODITE unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1CP.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: This unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While this unit is within 12" of one or more friendly AELDARI PSYKER models, models in this unit have a Leadership characteristic of 6+ and each time a model in this unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Each time this model makes a Normal or Advance move, it can move over friendly MONSTER and VEHICLE models and terrain features that are 4" or less in height as if they were not there.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a unit that can FLY, add 1 to the Hit roll.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While this model is leading a unit, once per phase, you can change the result of one Hit roll, one Wound roll or one Damage roll made for a model in that unit to an unmodified 6.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: At the end of your Movement phase, select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to this model. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a friendly AELDARI model makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Hit roll. Each unit can only be selected for this ability once per turn.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: This operator has the [Lone Operative] ability, when Tamishar is on the battle field.

characteristics.$text:
This unit can lead the following units:
■ MOUNTED ASURYANI
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Each model withing this unit has a 4+ invulnerable save.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to D6" as if it were your Movement phase.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Once per battle round, one model from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1CP.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While this model is leading a unit, each time that unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: All attacks allocated against Kinshar have their damage characteristic reduced to 1.

This unit can lead the following units:
MOUNTED ASURYANI

characteristics.$text: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly WRAITH CONSTRUCT units, this model has the [Lone Operative] ability.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Once per turn, in your Movement phase, when this model starts or ends a move, select one friendly WRAITH CONSTRUCT unit within 6" of this model (excluding TITANIC units) and one enemy unit visible to this model. Until the start of your next Movement phase, weapons equipped by models in that friendly unit have theability while targeting that enemy unit.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: In your Command phase, select one friendly WRAITH CONSTRUCT unit within 6" of this model. If one or more models in that unit are destroyed, you can return one destroyed model to that unit. Otherwise, one model in that unit regains up to D3 lost wounds. Each unit can only be selected for this ability once per turn.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: This models has an 4+ Invulnerable save.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While this model is leading a unit, each time you spend a Battle Focus token to enable that unit to perform an Agile Manoeuvre, roll one 06: on a 3+, you gain 1 Battle Focus token.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: At the start of your Command phase, if this model is your Warlord and is on the battlefield, you gain 1CP.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
This unit can lead the following units:
■ [EXODITE] INFANTRY or MOUNTED
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly AELDARI model makes an attack that targets that unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.
